Why Aethel

Everything a serious trader needs

Built from the ground up for retail traders who treat trading like a business.

📊

Live Analytics Dashboard

Real-time P&L, win rate, profit factor, R-multiple tracking, equity curve, and monthly performance charts — all in one view.

📓

Trade Journal

Log open and closed trades with entry/exit details, notes, stop losses, and setup descriptions. Full R-multiple analysis included.

🧮

Advanced Risk Calculator

Instant position sizing with portfolio allocation advisor and 1R–5R risk-reward target grid. Never over-risk again.

📈

Expectancy Projections

100-trade capital growth projection based on your historical win rate and average returns. See your statistical edge visualized.

📂

CSV Import

Import broker execution files from Robinhood, IBKR, Rakuten Securities, and Bybit. FIFO reconciliation done automatically.

🖼️

Trade Setup Gallery

Upload and organize chart screenshots for every trade. Review your setups visually to identify patterns in your winners and losers.

Inside the App

A dashboard built for clarity
